query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "dopd: dual on-policy distillation" computer science
rationale: The paper addresses the user's question by providing foundational work on "Dual On-policy Distillation" (DOPD) extensions through its proposal of "federated knowledge distillation" for Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models, satisfying criteria (a) for same-mechanism evidence (distillation) and (b) for measuring the dependent variable (perplexity) in the same domain (LLM training).
